critic_notes: Solid section. All six quotes normalize cleanly to verbatim substrings of the source (Q003 is a bullet list joined with ' • '; each fragment appears individually in the normalized source). Correct answers are directly supported and distractors are clearly wrong. Topic assignments are sensible: the two ISMS-definition items (Q001, Q002) carry 'methodik', the BSI-document/Kompendium-scope items (Q003–Q006) carry 'standards'. Difficulty labels ('basis') are appropriate for one-step paraphrases. Schema is correct for a Standards doc; page numbers fall inside 7..8.
